tooltips.signal_source: Switch between internal microphone and Software Defined Radio (SDR) input.
tooltips.theme: Select the visual theme for the spectrum and UI.
tooltips.rf_source: Choose the SDR hardware or simulation source.
tooltips.demodulation_mode: Select the method to extract audio from the RF signal.
tooltips.audio_output: Enable audio playback of the demodulated signal.
tooltips.rtl_tcp_host: IP address or hostname of the rtl_tcp server.
tooltips.rtl_tcp_port: Network port of the rtl_tcp server.
tooltips.center_frequency: Base frequency for the SDR tuner in MHz.
tooltips.rf_bandwidth: Capture bandwidth for the SDR in MHz.
tooltips.ppm_correction: Adjust for frequency drift in hardware (Parts Per Million).
tooltips.peak_hold: Display the maximum magnitude reached for each frequency.
tooltips.averaging_mode: Method used to smooth spectral data over time.
tooltips.averaging_count: Number of frames to include in the smoothing average.
tooltips.show_harmonics: Show indicators at multiples of the detected peak frequency.
tooltips.show_snr: Estimate and display Signal-to-Noise Ratio for the peak.
tooltips.fft_window_size: Resolution of the spectral analysis (samples per frame).
tooltips.fft_window_type: Mathematical function applied to reduce spectral leakage.
tooltips.frequency_skew: Visual stretching or compression of the frequency axis.
